messages.author: mattsains
messages.text: Are there any examples of how a group datagram message is received and parsed? I'm pretty familiar with how group text messages are formatted, and I'm trying to document the internal format of a group datagram. Or at minimum what it would be used for
messages.content_html: Are there any examples of how a group datagram message is received and parsed? I'm pretty familiar with how group text messages are formatted, and I'm trying to document the internal format of a group datagram. Or at minimum what it would be used for
